summary: Well-structured workflow and PowerShell solution. Strengths: least-privilege YAML permissions, clear modular design with explicit parameter validation, strong error handling, comprehensive integration testing via act with exact output assertions. Minor issues: Copy-Item should use -LiteralPath (test-harness.ps1 line 152); PESTER_PASSED output is unused (workflow line 66); act output parsing fragile to format changes; ConvertTo-GlobRegex algorithm sophisticated but dense. Production-ready quality with minimal polish needed.
